text.title: Team Development Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a symptom (observable signal) with root cause and concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: PM diagnoses stage by gut feel without retro evidence.
antipattern.root-cause: no retro signal cited in diagnosis
antipattern.fix: Require ≥2 retro citations per stage diagnosis.

antipattern.symptom: Charter has 'we collaborate' but no decision-rights table.

antipattern.root-cause: any critical skill row has 1 primary, 0 secondary
